preview_text:
The model rates the USA as favorite with a 44% win probability, while Paraguay's chances stand at 25%. The gap reflects a moderate edge for the USA, though the underdog retains a realistic path to victory on a neutral ground.

The draw emerges as a plausible outcome at 31%, narrowing the margin between a USA win and a full contest. The spread across all three outcomes suggests a competitive fixture rather than a heavily tilted one; no single result dominates decisively.

The market consensus—both sportsbooks and Polymarket—tilts toward the USA more sharply, pricing a win near 49% compared to the model's 44%. The gap of roughly 5 percentage points appears modest but consistent across venues. Market and model align closely on draw likelihood and Paraguay's chances. The dashboard makes no claim as to which assessment proves more accurate.
